mapper.select: SELECT source_type AS "sourceType", source_key AS "sourceKey", metric_code AS "metricCode", unit AS "unit" FROM lab_metric_mapping

SELECT ir.id AS "id", ir.inspection_time AS "observedAt", ir.inspection_result AS "resultJson", mt.tech_code AS "techCode", mt.tech_name AS "techName" FROM inspection_request ir LEFT JOIN medical_technology mt ON mt.id = ir.medical_technology_id WHERE ir.register_id = #{registerId} AND ir.inspection_result IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(ir.inspection_result) <> '' ORDER BY ir.inspection_time DESC NULLS LAST

SELECT cr.id AS "id", cr.check_time AS "observedAt", cr.check_result AS "resultJson", mt.tech_code AS "techCode", mt.tech_name AS "techName" FROM check_request cr LEFT JOIN medical_technology mt ON mt.id = cr.medical_technology_id WHERE cr.register_id = #{registerId} AND cr.check_result IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(cr.check_result) <> '' ORDER BY cr.check_time DESC NULLS LAST
SELECT MAX(pho.observed_at) FROM patient_health_observation pho WHERE pho.register_id = #{registerId} AND pho.metric_code = 'blood_glucose' AND pho.source_type = 'patient_report'

SELECT pho.metric_value FROM patient_health_observation pho WHERE pho.register_id = #{registerId} AND pho.metric_code = 'blood_glucose' AND pho.source_type = 'patient_report' ORDER BY pho.observed_at DESC, pho.id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO patient_health_observation ( register_id, observed_at, metric_code, metric_value, unit, source_type, source_ref_id, note ) VALUES ( #{registerId}, #{observedAt}, #{metricCode}, #{metricValue}, #{unit}, #{sourceType}, #{sourceRefId}, #{note} ) ON CONFLICT (register_id, metric_code, observed_at) DO UPDATE SET metric_value = EXCLUDED.metric_value, unit = EXCLUDED.unit, source_type = EXCLUDED.source_type, note = EXCLUDED.note
